content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "City Day". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1199/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of multiple test cases. Each test case contains two integers n and m on a single line, where n is the number of days until City Day and m is the number of days until the next holiday.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of days until either City Day or the next holiday.

solution.approach: Compare the given days until City Day and the next holiday, and output the minimum of the two.

code.Python3:
import sys
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    n, m = map(int, input().split())
    print(min(n, m))
